final_prompt.prompt:
Create a 9:16 vertical screenshot of a Douyin livestream featuring "神仙姐姐" holding a sign, for short-form video platform sharing.

Style/medium: Douyin livestream UI mockup with the saturated rhythmic energy of platform-native content
Composition: vertical 9:16 frame, livestream interface with comment feed on the right, gift animations floating, streamer centered holding sign at chest level
Subject: "神仙姐姐" (刘亦菲-style ethereal beauty) holding a rectangular sign with both hands, gentle smile, soft eye contact with camera
Scene/backdrop: warm indoor streaming room with soft bokeh lights, cozy aesthetic typical of Douyin beauty/lifestyle streamers
Lighting/mood: the warm honey glow of ring lights creating soft skin tones, intimate and welcoming atmosphere
Color palette: warm peach and rose tones with Douyin interface blues and gold gift icons
Materials/textures: soft fabric clothing, glossy sign surface with printed text
Text (verbatim): 今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！
Constraints: 9:16 vertical ratio, Douyin UI elements visible (viewer count, comment section, gift buttons), sign clearly readable
Avoid: Western streaming platform UI, harsh lighting, cluttered background, illegible text on sign
